UG-16  SCOPE. This Part states the requirements applicable to all pressure vessels and vessel parts. Design shall be in accordance with UG-22 through UG-34. Materials shall meet the requirements of UG-80. Fabrication of welded vessels shall comply with UW-26. All completed vessels shall be tested as required by UG-99. When applicable, UG-100 may be used for pneumatic testing. For inspection, see UG-93. Except as permitted by UG-47, inspection openings shall be provided. Vessels shall be marked per UG-115. Refer to UG-120 for data reports. Subject to the approval of the Inspector, UG-125 governs pressure relief devices.
